name: Cross-camera Re-ID (front + back door)
description: Two cameras run YOLO for people, then transform.reid stamps a global track_id so the same person walking from front to back gets the same id. Annotated streams show up as derived dashboard tiles.
use_case: Track the same person across non-overlapping cameras. CLIP backend (auto) is more robust than the histogram fallback; CPU-friendly enough for a Pi 5.
